items.title: Johnson calls DOJ surveillance of members reviewing Epstein files not 'appropriate'
items.description: Jayapal said lawmakers need to be assured the DOJ "is not spying on us."

items.title: Mexico could be at risk of losing its measles elimination status
items.description: Mexico could be at risk of losing its measles elimination status as the virus continues to spread across the country.

items.title: Nancy Guthrie live updates: Gloves among 'several items of evidence' recovered
items.description: The search is intensifying for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie.

items.title: WATCH:  NHL stars return to Olympic hockey for 1st time in 12 years
items.description: The U.S. men's hockey team begins its quest for Olympic gold on Thursday as NHL stars return to the winter games for the first time since 2014.

items.title: WATCH:  Dogs take on the Winter Games
items.description: As the real Winter Games take place thousands of miles away in Italy, two dogs brought it home in the U.S., delivering gold-medal-worthy performances.
